sections.biography-source-undefined: Gongsun Fan was a younger cousin of Gongsun Zan. Yuan Shao, who had enraged Gongsun Zan by killing Gongsun Yue, made Gongsun Fan the Grand Administrator of Bohai in an attempt to have peace between him and Gongsun Zan. Instead, Gongsun Fan used his newfound troops to assist Gongsun Zan in suppressing the local Yellow Scarves. Gongsun Fan then participated in the Battle of Jie Bridge where he was defeated.

full_text:
Gongsun Fan 公孫範
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Fan (公孫範)was born in Longxi. Cousin of Gongsun Zan. Given the seal to the Prefecture of Bohai by Yuan Shao. Gongsun Fan was affiliated with Gongsun Zan.

BiographySource Undefined
Gongsun Fan was a younger cousin of Gongsun Zan. Yuan Shao, who had enraged Gongsun Zan by killing Gongsun Yue, made Gongsun Fan the Grand Administrator of Bohai in an attempt to have peace between him and Gongsun Zan. Instead, Gongsun Fan used his newfound troops to assist Gongsun Zan in suppressing the local Yellow Scarves. Gongsun Fan then participated in the Battle of Jie Bridge where he was defeated.
